login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to your reader.
login.invalidInput: Please enter a valid email and password.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Register, then confirm your email.
register.done: Check your email for a confirmation link. After you confirm, an administrator reviews your account before you can sign in.

reset.requestSubtitle: We’ll email you a reset link.
reset.requestDone: If that address has an account, a reset link is on its way. The link is valid for 24 hours.
reset.linkInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
reset.failed: Could not reset the password. Request a new link.

verify.title: Confirm email
verify.ok: Your email is confirmed. An administrator will review your account before you can sign in.
verify.invalid: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired.

oauth.title: Signing you in
oauth.error: Sign-in did not complete. Please try again.
